description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the kylemanna/ci-embedded:latest Docker image. Define two jobs in the default test stage: an arm job that runs mkdir examples/embedded/build, pushd examples/embedded/build, cmake -DTOOLCHAIN_PREFIX=$TOOLCHAIN_PREFIX -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=gcc_stm32.cmake .., make VERBOSE=1, and make test ARGS=-V; and an x86-gcc job that runs mkdir examples/build, pushd examples/build, cmake .., make, and make test ARGS=-V. No services, caches, artifacts, or rules are required.
